inputs.label: True Airspeed
inputs.businessContext: True airspeed of the object relative to the air in meters per second.

businessContext_i18n.en: True airspeed of the object relative to the air in meters per second.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin havaya göre saniyede metre cinsinden gerçek hava hızı.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient air temperature in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ambient air temperature in degrees Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santigrat derece cinsinden ortam hava sıcaklığı.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats; for air, γ = 1.4.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of specific heats; for air, γ = 1.4.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özgül ısı oranı; hava için γ = 1,4.

inputs.label: Specific Gas Constant
inputs.businessContext: Specific gas constant for the gas; for dry air, R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific gas constant for the gas; for dry air, R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gaz için özgül gaz sabiti; kuru hava için R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
